items.name: overrides-button-base
items.title: Button (Base UI)
items.description: A button component built on Base UI. Copy of the original shadcn button with the same API and variants.

items.name: overrides-button-radix
items.title: Button (Radix)
items.description: A button component built on Radix UI Slot. Same API as the Base UI version, with asChild support for composition.
